note: Indicative reference ranges for French SMEs/mid-caps (Euronext Paris universe). Multiples are enterprise-value based; equity value = EV - net debt. Every sector entry documents its source, as-of date and confidence level — see also waccAssumptions for the shared WACC building blocks. These are DEFAULTS for a first estimate, not investment advice; low-confidence entries should be reviewed by a valuation professional before client-facing use.

waccAssumptions.source: Risk-free: France 10Y OAT government bond yield, live snapshot ~3.8% (Investing.com, Jul 2026). Equity risk premium: Damodaran Country Default Spreads and Risk Premiums for France (Aa3 rating, total ERP 5.01%, table dated 5 Jan 2026, pages.stern.nyu.edu/~adamodar). Size premium: Sorgem Evaluation, 'La Prime de Taille' (2016), reviewing Duff & Phelps / CRSP decile studies and French expert-opinion precedents.
waccAssumptions.confidence: medium — risk-free rate and ERP are directly sourced and current; the size premium is a genuinely disputed range in the valuation literature and is a working assumption, low confidence, à valider par un expert. Per-sector WACC below is a derived synthesis of these building blocks plus a sector risk adjustment, not itself a single quoted figure.

software.label: Software & IT services
software.source: EV/EBITDA and EV/Revenue: Hectelion 'Valuation Multiples France/Switzerland 2026' (SaaS ~14x EBITDA, 3-8x Revenue), cross-checked as a ceiling against Damodaran Jan 2026 industry data (Software 24-30x, Computer Services 14.1x — large-cap, used for sanity-check only, not as the quoted range).
software.confidence: medium — multiples come from a secondary aggregator rather than a dedicated French SME-only dataset; à valider par un expert avant utilisation en clientèle.

industrials.label: Industrials & manufacturing
industrials.source: EV/EBITDA: Argos Index / Epsilon Research, eurozone unlisted mid-market median 8.3x EBITDA (Q4 2025), consistent with Damodaran Jan 2026 Machinery (16.2x, large-cap ceiling check). EV/Revenue range derived from the EBITDA range assuming a typical industrials EBITDA margin, not independently sourced.
industrials.confidence: medium for EV/EBITDA (real recurring French index); low for EV/Revenue (derived, not directly sourced) — à valider par un expert.

healthcare.label: Healthcare & life sciences
healthcare.source: Hectelion 'Valuation Multiples France/Switzerland 2026' (Healthcare Products 10.5-19.8x), cross-checked against Damodaran Jan 2026 (Healthcare Products 19.8x, Pharma 15.3x, Biotech 15.8x — large-cap ceiling check). EV/Revenue range derived, not independently sourced.
healthcare.confidence: medium — secondary aggregator, not French-SME-specific; EV/Revenue is derived, à valider par un expert.

consumer.label: Consumer goods & retail
consumer.source: Hectelion Consumer Discretionary mid-market reference (~10.8x), positioned against the Argos Index general mid-market median (8.3x, Q4 2025). No dedicated French SME source found for this sector specifically.
consumer.confidence: low, à valider par un expert — figures are order-of-magnitude plausible against the general mid-market median but not independently verified for consumer/retail specifically.

food.label: Food & beverage
food.source: Damodaran Jan 2026 Food Processing (10.0x) and Beverage-Alcoholic (8.6x), both close to the Argos Index general mid-market median (8.3x, Q4 2025) — a reasonable consistency check for a defensive, lower-growth sector. EV/Revenue range derived, not independently sourced.
food.confidence: medium for EV/EBITDA; low for EV/Revenue (derived) — à valider par un expert.

energy.label: Energy & environment
energy.source: Damodaran Jan 2026 shows this segment is highly heterogeneous: Oil & Gas Production 5.2x vs. Environmental & Waste Services 15.6x vs. Green/Renewable Energy 13.4x. No dedicated French SME source found; the range attempts to span traditional and renewable sub-segments.
energy.confidence: low, à valider par un expert — the sector spans fundamentally different risk profiles (fossil vs. renewable) that a single range cannot capture well.

business-services.label: Business services
business-services.source: Damodaran Jan 2026 Business & Consumer Services (14.3x, large-cap ceiling check) and the Argos Index general mid-market median (8.3x, Q4 2025). No granular French SME source found beyond these general benchmarks.
business-services.confidence: low, à valider par un expert — largely unverified for this sector specifically.

default.label: All sectors (default)
default.source: Anchored to the Argos Index / Epsilon Research eurozone unlisted mid-market median (8.3x EBITDA, Q4 2025), a real recurring French M&A benchmark used here as a sector-agnostic fallback.
default.confidence: medium — reasonable generic fallback, not a substitute for a sector-specific figure.
